meaning: n.灞堟湇,闄嶆湇,鏈嶄粠,璋︽伃,鎶曢檷
examples: They prepared a report for submission to the council.
We think an attempt to bully them into submission would be counterproductive.
What might happen to such a submission today?
This full submission to the UNESCO consultaton will be available for dowload in late summer 2015.
After all, there are few finer places than Ireland to beat your body into submission.
